title: Atomic Chat Model Catalog — Org Whitelist
description: Schema for config/orgs.json: the list of Hugging Face organizations the scraper enumerates.

schema_version.description: Bump when the org entry shape changes in a backwards-incompatible way.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp; refresh on every meaningful change.

name.description: Hugging Face org id (case-sensitive). Used as ?author={name} in the HF API.

priority_boost.description: Static, platform-neutral baseline weight. Client multiplies by a platform-aware ORG_BOOST.

active.description: Set to false to keep the entry for documentation purposes but skip it during scrape.

min_downloads.description: Skip repos with fewer downloads than this threshold.

tags_required.description: Skip repos that do not carry ALL of these tags.

max_repos.description: Cap on the number of repos kept after sorting by downloads (top-N).
